basic_details.job_title: ICFRE Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Associate-III, Junior Research Fellow and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Council of Forestry Research and Education (ICFRE)
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate-III, Database Manager, Junior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: Indian Council of Forestry Research and Education (ICFRE) Research Associate-III, Database Manager, Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website icfre.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the ICFRE Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, Women, PH, OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., M.Sc., B.Tech., M.Tech., MCA, Diploma
qualification.details: Research Associate-III (Ecology & Sustainable Land Management): Ph.D. in Forestry / Ecology / Environmental Science / Natural Resource Management / Restoration Ecology or related disciplines OR M.Sc. in Forestry / Ecology / Environmental Science / Natural Resource Management or related disciplines with NET (CSIR/UGC/ASRB) and a minimum of 5 years of research / project experience. Research Associate-III (Web / Knowledge Platform Support): B.Tech. / M.Tech. / MCA / M.Sc. in Computer Science / IT / Web Technologies or related disciplines, with a minimum of 3–5 years of experience in development of web platforms / portals / LMS / dashboards / UI-UX systems. Database Manager (Digital Systems & Dashboard Support): B.Tech. / M.Tech. / MCA / Diploma in Information Technology / M.Sc. in Computer Science / Computer Applications / Information Technology / Data Science / Geoinformatics or related disciplines, with a minimum of 2–3 years of experience in database development, web-based data handling, software / dashboard / digital platform support. Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Postgraduate degree in Forestry / Environmental Science / Ecology / Botany / GIS / Information Technology or related disciplines with NET (UGC/CSIR/ASRB) / GATE.

salary_details.details: Research Associate-III (Ecology & Sustainable Land Management): ₹67,000/- per month + HRA @ 20% Research Associate-III (Web / Knowledge Platform Support): ₹67,000/- per month + HRA @ 20% Database Manager (Digital Systems & Dashboard Support): ₹50,000/- per month + HRA as per rules Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹37,000/- per month + HRA @ 20%

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICFRE?
faq.answer: ICFRE has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the posts of Research Associate-III, Database Manager, and Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 03 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for ICFRE posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) will receive a monthly salary of ₹37,000/- plus HRA @ 20%.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Associate-III posts?
faq.answer: For Research Associate-III (Ecology & Sustainable Land Management), a Ph.D. or M.Sc. with NET and 5 years of experience is required. For Research Associate-III (Web / Knowledge Platform Support), a B.Tech./M.Tech./MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science/IT with 3-5 years of experience is needed.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the ICFRE recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICFRE, Dehradun, Uttarakhand, 248006.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these ICFRE posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview.
